name: win64c-api-set-nonlocale-dynamic-wrapper-consumers

scope.source: Follow-up from win64c-api-set-resolver-invocations rows outside the locale/string bootstrap set.

wrapper_functions.behavior: Resolves the API through 0x1407DB960, forwards RCX=-6 and RDX=original output pointer through the guard dispatch pointer when present, and returns NTSTATUS 0xC0000225 when the resolver cannot produce a target.
Resolves the API through 0x1407DB960, forwards RCX=-6 and RDX=original output pointer through the guard dispatch pointer when present, and returns NTSTATUS 0xC0000225 when unresolved.

Saves the caller's ECX, resolves RoInitialize, and guard-dispatches to the resolved target when available. The unresolved path falls through the epilogue without an explicit HRESULT setup in this wrapper.
Resolves RoUninitialize, guard-dispatches it when present, and returns either way. The caller gates this through an object byte at [context+0x20].

Preserves RCX buffer and EDX length, resolves RtlGenRandom/SystemFunction036, and tail-dispatches the resolved target when present. The unresolved path calls 0x1407C45DC and ends in an INT3 fail path.

caller_findings.finding: Reads app_policy_cache at 0x140C5725C. On a zero cache value it checks 0x1407E4D3C, conditionally calls AppPolicyGetThreadInitializationType, then stores either 1 or 2 back to 0x140C5725C with XCHG. Later callers can treat any nonzero value as initialized.

Calls 0x1407E4D3C before AppPolicyGetProcessTerminationMethod and returns whether the resulting policy output is not 1. This is the only direct caller of the process termination policy wrapper found in the direct-call scan.

Requires a non-null context, stores it at [object+0x3C0], queries the app-policy cache, conditionally calls RoInitialize when the cached result is 2, records RoInitialize success as [context+0x20], calls a guarded callback from [context], then invokes teardown helpers 0x1407CD378 and 0x1407D8438.

Recovers the context from [object+0x3C0]. If [context+0x20] is nonzero, it calls RoUninitialize. It conditionally closes handles at [context+0x10] and [context+0x18], then exits through FreeLibraryAndExitThread or ExitThread.

Rejects a null output pointer with errno-style 0x16 and calls 0x1407BF1E0. For non-null output it zeroes the dword, calls SystemFunction036 with length 4, returns 0 on success, or records errno-style 0x0C and returns the errno value on failure.

helper_findings.finding: Reads GS:[0x30] -> PEB -> ProcessParameters, then returns the high bit of a dword at [ProcessParameters+0x28]. This gates both AppPolicy wrapper callers before invoking appmodel runtime APIs.
Calls 0x1407DB6C4 and returns [result+0x20] when available, otherwise returns fallback slot 0x140C36310. The SystemFunction036 caller uses this for error value writes and reads.
Clears the first four calling convention arguments plus stack slot [RSP+0x20], then calls 0x1407BF078. This sits on the null-output branch before returning errno 0x16.
Thin trampoline to 0x1407CD1D4, reached after the guarded lifecycle callback in 0x1407CD164.

The 0x1407D8444 path encodes an incoming pointer with cookie 0x140C361A8 and writes it to 0x140C56A08. A cookie mismatch branches to 0x1407D3308 and INT3. Neighboring entrypoints tail-jump to 0x1407D8280 with small constant arguments.

tooling_status.reason_no_tool_change: The existing exporters already produced the needed direct caller, literal, import-resolution, helper-instruction, and wrapper-call evidence for this slice without another reusable manual step.

open_questions: Name 0x1407DB54C and 0x1407DB6C4 by following their object/TLS access patterns.
Confirm whether 0x1407F4450 is the final CFG guard dispatch shim or a local wrapper over it.
Follow encoded callback slot 0x140C56A08 consumers to connect the WinRT lifecycle callback back into the broader bootstrap path.
